div.head: The Secretary of State to the Greek Minister (Simopoulos)
div.p:
Sir: I am requested by the Secretary of the Treasury to notify the Government of Greece that there was received on November 10, 1934,
by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York for credit in the account of the Treasurer of the United States, the sum of $76,272 from the International Financial Committee, Athens, on behalf of the Government of Greece representing a partial payment of interest due from that Government on account of the 4% loan of 1929 made to the Greek Government by the United States under the Funding Agreement of May 10, 1929.
These funds were applied by the Treasury to the payment of 35% of the semi-annual interest amounting to $217,920, due November 10, 1934, on the 4% loan of 1929.
div.closer:
For the Secretary of State:
R. Walton Moore
